hero.headline: Everything you need for
hero.subtitle: Your trusted technology partner. We craft smarter systems, bolder digital products, and AI-powered solutions — all under one roof.

products.label: Products
products.title: Tools built for the modern web
products.desc: Powerful standalone micro-tools engineered for developers and teams. Precise. Fast. Reliable.

liveness.name: Passive Liveness Detection
liveness.desc: Frictionless identity verification. Anti-spoofing biometric detection that distinguishes real faces from photos, videos, and 3D masks — without user interaction.

base64.name: Base64 Suite
base64.desc: Encode, decode, and validate Base64 strings in real-time with support for URL-safe variants.

portfolio.name: Portfolio Platform
portfolio.desc: Every user gets a personalised /@slug page to showcase skills, experience, and achievements.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Services that move the needle
services.desc: From concept to deployment, we bring strategy, engineering, and creativity together to deliver results that matter.

consulting.title: IT Consulting
consulting.desc: Strategy, audits, and technology roadmaps tailored to your business goals.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.desc: Full-stack Laravel applications, APIs, and pixel-perfect frontends.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.desc: Embedding machine learning models into your existing workflows and products.

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devops.desc: Automated pipelines, containerised deployments, and zero-downtime releases.

training.title: Tech Training
training.desc: Workshops and mentoring programs to upskill your team in modern technologies.

product.title: Product Strategy
product.desc: Turning ideas into market-ready digital products with validated problem-solution fit.

workflow.label: How We Work
workflow.title: From idea to launch in four steps

discovery.name: Discovery
discovery.desc: We deep-dive into your goals, users, and constraints to shape a crystal-clear project brief.

design.name: Design
design.desc: Wireframes, prototypes, and UI systems built for speed, clarity, and delight.

development.name: Development
development.desc: Robust, tested, production-ready code — shipped iteratively with full transparency.

liftoff.name: Liftoff
liftoff.desc: Deployment, monitoring, and ongoing support to keep your system flying.

about.label: About RBeverything
about.title: We believe technology should feel effortless
about.desc: RBeverything is a technology studio passionate about building products that are not only powerful but delightful to use. From solo developers to growing companies, we help organisations harness the right tools at the right time.

footer.slogan: Everything you need. Smarter systems, bolder results — delivered with precision and care.
footer.based: Based in Indonesia. Serving clients worldwide.
